headline: LeBlanc 🍁🇨🇦 begs USMCA 16-Yr RENEWAL 🔄🗓️ before July DEADLINE 💥
text: Canada 🍁🍁 formally SLID into US & Mexico DMs 📲🤝 asking to EXTEND the USMCA trade pact 🔄🗓️ another 16 years 🗓️😍 calling it SUPER beneficial for all three bros 🇨🇦🇺🇸🇲🇽. Trade Minister Dominic LeBlanc 🍁👔 sent the renewal letter ✉️💌 to his North American homies while chilling in Washington DC 🏛️🗽 with US Trade Rep Jamieson Greer 🤝🇺🇸. Talks with Mexico went SMOOTH like maple syrup 🍁🥞 but Canada-US negotiations LAGGED 😩🏎️ over sector tariffs on steel 🏗️, aluminum 🥫, cars 🚗 and lumber 🪵. PM Mark Carney 🍁🧔 wants those tariffs GONE or LOWERED 📉🙏 while Greer says Canada might have to EAT some US tariffs 🍔💸. Canada retaliated by YANKING American liquor 🥃🚫 off shelves after Trump tariffs, making US mad 😡🍺. US wants MORE dairy access 🥛🐄 but Canada keeps strict quotas to PROTECT local farmers 🧑‍🌾🛡️. Greer also pushing for 50% American-made car content 🚗🇺🇸 in North American autos while Carney clapped back saying Canadian cars ALREADY hit that mark 🎯🇨🇦. Carney dropped the line Canada Strong 💪🍁 will help Make America Great Again 🇺🇸🔥. Conservatives are PRESSURING Carney like it's Black Friday 🛍️😤 with MP Jasraj Singh Hallan calling him a 'grand illusionist' 🎩✨ failing to grow the economy 📉😭. Greer roasted Canada saying only China 🇨🇳 and Canada retaliated so they're in a 'different spot' 🗺️🤷. If no deal by July 1 💥🗓️ the pact auto-renews yearly until 2036 ⏰🔁. LeBlanc still optimistic 🤞🍁 Greer & Carney gonna KISS & MAKE UP 💋🤝 before the clock runs out ⏳🚨!
